stories.headline: Sanctioned tankers transit Strait of Hormuz amid US blockade
stories.description: Chinese-owned tanker Rich Starry becomes the first sanctioned vessel to exit the Gulf after the US blockade.

stories.headline: Pakistan hospital at centre of child HIV outbreak caught reusing syringes in BBC film
stories.description: Pakistan hospital staff reuse syringes, footage shows, boss denies validity.

stories.headline: Lebanon and Israel to hold direct diplomatic talks
stories.description: Lebanon and Israel will hold direct diplomatic talks for the first time in decades.

stories.headline: Russia’s Lavrov visits China as US pressures Iran with Hormuz blockade
stories.description: China and Russia have been vocal critics of the US-Israel war on Iran, an ally of both world powers.

stories.headline: World faces food ‘catastrophe’ if Strait of Hormuz disruption persists: FAO
stories.description: Global agriculture is highly exposed to the blockage of waterways, risking higher commodity prices and food inflation.
